description: You are a molecular biologist preparing a figure for a publication. Create a comparative montage of 5 fluorescence microscopy images from ~/Fiji_Data/raw/BBBC005/ that share the same focus level (F1) but have different cell counts (C values). Standardize the display settings across all images using a global min/max brightness range and a Grays LUT to ensure matched contrast. Set the spatial scale for all images to 0.650 microns/pixel. Produce a labeled montage in a 1 row by 5 columns layout with a thin border, including a 50 micron scale bar in the lower right and labels 'Condition 1' through 'Condition 5' for the respective panels. Save the final montage as figure_montage.png and figure_montage.tif in ~/Fiji_Data/results/montage/. In the same folder, generate panel_metadata.csv (including panel_number, source_filename, display_min, display_max, and pixel_scale_um) and panel_statistics.csv (including panel_number, mean_intensity, and std_intensity). The final output must be publication-quality with matched contrast across all panels.
